title: Solid Cash Balance Boosts Wabtec (WAB) Despite Expense Woes
text: Strong cash balance and strategic acquisitions aid Wabtec (WAB). However, high operating expenses are worrisome.

title: Wabtec (WAB) Buys ARINC Rail Solutions, Expands in US & Canada
text: The ARINC Rail Solutions buyout helps Wabtec (WAB) expand its digital and electronics portfolio and enhance productivity, safety and efficiency across the global rail network.

title: Wabtec Acquires Collins Aerospace's ARINC Rail Solutions Business to Extend Rail Optimization Portfolio
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB), a leading global supplier for freight and transit rail, has acquired Collins Aerospace's ARINC rail solutions business segment, a provider of intelligence-based rail dispatch and back-office solutions. The financial terms of the acquisition were not disclosed. “ARINC's rail solutions systems, coupled with Wabtec's digital and electronics portfolio, will accelerate the industry's journey of rail optimization,” said Nalin Jain, Presiden

title: Wabtec (WAB) Receives Canadian National's New Software Order
text: Wabtec (WAB) receives Canadian National's order for its newly launched Precision Dispatch System, which is expected to help the latter increase capacity and improve efficiency across its network.

title: CN to utilize new Wabtec software providing network visibility
text: Canadian railway CN will be using new and advanced software from rail technology provider Wabtec that both parties say could be a major step toward network automation for the rail industry. The software, called precision dispatch system, collects and analyzes data from all rolling stock, wayside device assets and positive train control in order to monitor network conditions and provide network visibility.

title: Wabtec Advances Rail Network Optimization for CN with the Launch of its Precision Dispatch System
text: PITTSBURGH & MONTREAL--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wabtec (NYSE: WAB) launched its new Precision Dispatch System today with an order from CN (TSX: CNR) (NYSE: CNI). The Precision Dispatch deal marks a major step toward network automation for CN and the entire rail industry. “CN is leading the industry in rail network optimization as the launch customer for the Precision Dispatch System,” said Nalin Jain, President of Wabtec's Digital Electronics business. “This system is the first-of-its-kind and acts as
